title: fagonia persica
intro: Fagonia persica, also known as beldi or ghas, is a desert plant native to North Africa and the Middle East. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fagonia persica include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, and treating digestive problems like diarrhea and stomach ulcers. Fagonia persica is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in traditional remedies like poultices and ointments.
